about.hero.title1: Turn social media data into a
about.hero.subtitle: InsightFlow was created with the mission to bring the power of state-of-the-art AI to help Vietnamese brands deeply understand customers and master all discussion trends.
about.logo.title: The story behind the logo
about.logo.subtitle: Every line carries a meaning
about.logo.card1Desc: The letters I and F are stylized as a continuous wave line — symbolizing the non-stop flow of data from social media into the analytics system.
about.logo.card2Desc: Purple is the color of wisdom, creativity, and advanced technology. It is also the color of trust — the core value that InsightFlow delivers.
about.logo.card3Desc: "Insight" — deep understandings hidden in data. "Flow" — natural, continuous, and uninterrupted flow. Together: turning data into smart action.
about.mission.title: Vision & Mission
about.mission.subtitle: We don't just provide tools, we build platforms for Vietnamese businesses to lead with data.
about.mission.desc1: InsightFlow was built with one belief: every Vietnamese business — whether large or small — deserves the power of AI to truly understand their customers.
about.mission.desc2: We do not just provide data. We give you perspective — so that every communication decision is based on truth, not emotion.
about.vision.desc: Become the leading Social Intelligence platform in Southeast Asia — where pure Vietnamese AI understands Vietnamese language, culture, and people deeper than any imported technology.
about.values.title: Core Values
about.values.subtitle: The culture at InsightFlow is built on the commitment to bring real value to customers.
about.values.val1Desc: We continuously update the latest AI models like GPT-4, Llama 3, and proprietary Vietnamese NLP models to deliver optimal accuracy.
about.values.val2Desc: Data is collected and processed in strict compliance with security regulations. All analytical metrics have clear, objective sources.
about.values.val3Desc: Business success is the measure of our value. InsightFlow is always side-by-side to support 24/7 in all situations.
about.team.title: Top Experts Team
about.team.subtitle: A team combining academic research and business battlefield experience
about.cta.title: Ready to discover hidden insights in millions of conversations?
about.cta.desc: 🚀 14-day free trial — No credit card required
industries.hero.subtitle: InsightFlow's AI system is fine-tuned to understand language, food reviews, and diner behavior on social media in Vietnam.
industries.grid.card1Desc: Monitor service quality at scale, evaluate individual outlet performance, and track diner feedback on new dishes.
industries.grid.card1Quote: "InsightFlow helps us detect and immediately resolve complaints about service attitude at new branches, avoiding public relations crises."
industries.grid.card2Desc: Track the virality of promotional campaigns (Flash Sales, Combos), and monitor uniform quality across franchise dealers.
industries.grid.card2Quote: "The system helped us accurately measure the viral effect of our new Fried Chicken flavor launch campaign after just 24 hours."
industries.grid.card3Desc: Capture details of premium customer experiences, from dining ambiance and staff attitude to the signature flavor of each dish.
industries.grid.card3Quote: "Our customers demand perfection. AI helps us understand the smallest details of their experience through long review posts."
industries.grid.card4Desc: Manage restaurant partners, track feedback on delivery speed, shipper attitude, and app quality across all social media fronts.
industries.grid.card4Quote: "We can closely follow every single move of our competitors' promotions thanks to real-time updates."
industries.grid.card4Author: Business Development Director, Food Delivery App
industries.bento.chartDesc: Our system collects millions of posts daily from Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, and News to deliver the most comprehensive view.
industries.bento.accuracyDesc: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained specifically for the context and slang of Vietnamese people on social networks.
industries.bento.realtimeDesc: Data updated every 5 minutes, ensuring you never miss any market fluctuations.
industries.bento.scaleDesc: From startup businesses to multinational corporations, InsightFlow provides flexible service packages based on actual needs.
industries.cta.title: Ready to elevate your brand?
industries.cta.desc: Join 500+ leading businesses in Vietnam using InsightFlow to master communications.
